texto: I love you in my bed at night, and when I wake up, and I love hearing you sing, and I love telling you to stop bothering me, and I love walking to Van’s noodle house with you, and I love you – I love you, so promise you’ll be like the ocean and come back to me, even when they pull you away. Always come back to me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Standbyme: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I love you in my bed at night, and when I wake up, and I love hearing you sing, and I love tellin…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, fanfiction, love-quotes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

frase_original: I love you in my bed at night, and when I wake up, and I love hearing you sing, and I love telling you to stop bothering me, and I love walking to Van’s noodle house with you, and I love you – I love you, so promise you’ll be like the ocean and come back to me, even when they pull you away. Always come back to me.
